hero.eyebrow: The Platform for Iraqi Political Thought
hero.title:
Critique the Structure
For a Prosperous Iraq
hero.description: Rigorous analysis and constructive criticism of Iraqi affairs — governance, economic policy, corruption, and institutional reform. One goal: a just and prosperous Iraq.

footer.tagline: Critique the structure, not the person
footer.tagline_sub: For an Iraq governed by institutions and justice

lazy.title: TL;DR — For the Lazy
lazy.subtitle: Key points for those with better things to do

about.tariq_bio: Iraqi thinker writing from the diaspora. Critical of systems, never personal. One goal: a prosperous Iraq.
about.platform_body: Al-Minbar is a platform for political analysis and critical Iraqi thought. We believe reform begins with accurate diagnosis, proceeds through constructive critique, and arrives at sound institutional practice. We do not attack people — we analyse systems.
about.mission_body: Constructive, evidence-based criticism of Iraqi governance — focused on the Prime Minister's office, economic policy, anti-corruption, infrastructure, and institutional reform.

submit.title: Submit an Article
submit.subtitle: Have analysis worth publishing?
submit.body: Al-Minbar is open to contributions from serious writers and analysts who share our vision: critiquing systems objectively with evidence, not personal attacks. If you write about Iraqi affairs with depth and rigour, get in touch.
guidelines: Evidence and data-based analysis, not bare opinion
Critique the structure and system, not the individual
Subject: Iraqi political, economic, and social affairs
submit.login_prompt: Create an account or sign in to submit your article directly
submit.form_youtube_hint: Add a YouTube video that appears inside the article
